body: {"error":{"message":"error parsing tool call: raw='{\"command\":\"python3 - \u003c\u003c'PY'\\nfrom pf import ParticleFilter\\nimport numpy as np\\npf = ParticleFilter(n_particles=200, corridor_length=10.0)\\n# Simulate robot starting at x=2.0\\nx = 2.0\\nfor i in range(30):\\n    control = 0.5\\n    noise = np.random.normal(scale=0.1)\\n    x += control + noise\\n    # sensor: distance to wall\\n
